ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "family" REAL /* Number of family interactions */,
  "colleagues" REAL /* Number of colleague interactions */,
  "friends" REAL /* Number of friend interactions */,
  "strangers" REAL /* Number of stranger interactions */,
  "total" REAL /* Total number of interactions */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of interaction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the interaction took place */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium of interaction (e.g., in-person, phone, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last user login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_interactions, edit_interactions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_details" (
  "interaction_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction detail */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the interaction */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the interaction (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_details_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_details_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_dates" (
  "interaction_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction date */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_dates_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)
